title: Why the census matters | Stats NZ
content:
## Why the census matters
See stories of communities around Aotearoa New Zealand who benefit from the kind of data that is gathered in the census.
By doing the census, you create a better idea of what you, your family, and your community need. By knowing these needs, government agencies, councils, iwi, community groups and businesses can plan how to respond to them. Your census answers, combined with everyone else's, help groups like these help us all.

## Data helps people access and use New Zealand Sign Language

## Data helps Rainbow youth be seen and supported

## Data helps support community wellbeing

## Data helps connect rangatahi to job opportunities

## Data protects and preserves our languages

## Data helps our communities get the help they need

## Data helps Asian Family Services support communities throughout Aotearoa New Zealand

## Data helps meet our community health needs

## Data helps Cook Islands Māori thrive into the next generation

## Data helps rangatahi reach their potential

## Data helps Whānau Āwhina Plunket support children and their families

## Data helps students honour their culture
